description: You are assisting a technical writer with RSI who needs to generate and align Markdown tables entirely by voice using Talon. Develop a Talon system including a Python module at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\markdown_tables\markdown_tables.py, a command file at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\markdown_tables\markdown_tables.talon, and a verification script at C:\workspace\run_conversion.py. The Python module must implement md_table_empty(rows: int, cols: int) to return an empty Markdown table with a header and separator row (using hyphens and single-space cells), md_table_from_csv(csv_text: str) to convert CSV data into a Markdown table where columns and separator hyphens are padded to match the longest string in each column, and md_table_convert_clipboard() to process and insert clipboard content. The .talon file must bind the voice command "table generate <number> by <number>" to the empty table action and "table paste csv" to the clipboard conversion action. Use the column-alignment logic in C:\workspace\run_conversion.py to process C:\workspace\data\gdp_metrics.csv and save the formatted Markdown table to C:\workspace\output\gdp_table.md. Ensure all code is syntactically correct and files are saved.
